claim_scope: No DRAT, no Lean closure, no arbitrary-cardinality claim; UNKNOWN means unresolved under 600 seconds.
encoded_corrections: every selected row centered in a displayed cap has at most two support points in that cap
every selected row centered at a triangle endpoint has at most one support point in either incident displayed cap
collision uses an actual common full radius class of cardinality at least five
packed uses two actual support-disjoint exact-four minimal-core shells
the robust center is omitted from the lateFirstApexSystem blocker image
full_linear_warning: No SAT endpoint may be called a survivor before all concrete row instances, including repeated-center collision or packed rows, pass the tracked full-linear Kalmanson checker.
